[[BLOCK:p_39]]
Library Services at Hawaii Pacific University (HPU) (HPU):

[[BLOCK:p_40]]
Hawaii Pacific University (HPU) library resources are available through your Pipeline account. Select the “Library” tab, then click on “Databases” to access the available collections. (A list of library databases that may be helpful for this course is provided.)

[[BLOCK:p_42]]
You may request assistance at any time by using the “Help” feature under the Library tab or the “Chat with a Librarian” tool in the course menu. You can also access library guides and quick links through the following website: http://hpu.libguides.com/

Expectations for Class Discussion:
